title: Print à item on monday
excerpt:
Hi, 
i want to print a item, is possible ? 
Thks

posts.author: Steve35 (LE R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

i want to print a item, is possible ?

Thks

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Steve

You can filter your board and then print from the 3 dots board menu just the selection.

Do you think that would work for you?

posts.author: Naomi (Naomi Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia,

We would also like the option to print an item in a nice one page portrait view as seen in the Kanban board when you click on an item - is this possible?

Exporting the line to excel or printing from the board after filtering does not allow us to see the whole row if there are more than say 5 columns and it also doesn’t expand the comment field which means we cannot use the print option

Cheers,
Naomi
